title: corruption craft
body:
![the corruption craft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ee9839b5fceb186255a5228ff793698dea8259.png)

# about
welcome to **corruption craft**, a modpack so broken, that it's probably worse than your grandmother's windows xp computer from 2 decades ago!
ever wanted to play minecraft but mathematics was a mere suggestion? no? well too bad because now the math is so bad that it forgot how to add numbers together

movement is inconsistent and is probably attached to a sine wave, sliders are limitless and can be dragged onto your second monitor, and your gui had an existential crisis and a seizure at the same time

# features (kind of):
- textures made in ms paint
- flattened player models
- randomised crafting recipes
- randomised drops
- a version number that says “Minecraft 2: Ultra Definitive Remastered Super Duper 4K Ultra HD RTX Edition”
- the default font is now the standard galactic alphabet, because reading is a luxury, not a privilege 
- if you somehow can't perfectly read enchanting table, you can enable a capitalised font if you really really wanted to, but first you have to find where the resource packs button is
- the hunger bar is now chorus fruit
- the crosshair is an arrow now
- the hearts are blue
- the xp bar is rainbow
- the inventory is transparent
- the rain is now phantoms

download corruption craft today, and make sure to have a terrible experience!
(terms and conditions apply, side effects may include extreme rage, nausea, diarrhoea, blindness, confusion, existential crisis, anxiety, depression, hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia, and an itchy nose, and i am not responsible for any of these side effects whatsoever)
